subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-03
subcodes.first_line: During the first years of our stay in Baghdad, Baha'o'llah suddenly departed for the
subcodes.subjects: @Baha'u'llah in Sulaymaniyyih, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
